Game.Name: Sports Illustrated Championship Football & Baseball (USA)
Game.plot: Overview:Sports Illustrated: Championship Football & Baseball is a sports game developed and published by Malibu Interactive and licensed by the Sports Illustrated magazine. Unusually for sports game of the era, it has full-featured modes for both football and baseball. A truncated version of the game was released in Europe as All-American Championship Football, but this version only retained the football portion of the cart.For the football portion, the game has a variety of play options such an exhibition game as well as the ability to play functional seasons. Features city teams based on locations of real NFL teams. Also, the ability to compare two individual team's overall stats.The baseball section contains pitching as well as hitting. If the player hits a home run, the game displays HOME RUN on a scoreboard.
